name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Our midnight deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
Sisters and Brothers -
Today is one of the most important days of our campaign: the final FEC fundraising deadline of the Democratic primary.
The last six states vote in one week, including California -- the contest with the most delegates at stake in this race. And what today's deadline will tell us is whether or not working people coming together and contributing small amounts of money can compete and win to the end against the millionaires and billionaires who have bankrolled Hillary Clinton's campaign and her largest super PACs.
Our mission now is to go into the Democratic convention with as many votes, delegates and states as possible. From there, superdelegates will have to consider who is the best candidate to take on Donald Trump. That's why I have to ask:
[**If every supporter who has signed up to join our campaign made one $2.70 contribution before tonight 's midnight deadline, it would ensure we have the resources we need to win in California and make our strongest case possible at the Democratic convention.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-final-deadline?refcode=em160531-am-s1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-final-deadline?refcode=em160531-am-s1-full")
Let me be very honest. Our path to victory is very narrow. It would take us defying every single expectation next Tuesday and making a very convincing case at the convention. But we have been fighting uphill from day one, and I believe we owe it to ourselves to try. That's why your contribution before tonight's deadline, the last of the primary, is so important.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-final-deadline?refcode=em160531-am-s1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-final-deadline?refcode=em160531-am-s1-full")**

name: Corry Bliss
subject: Our first television ads
body:
| Peter -- I want you to be the first to see the campaign's first television ads - "[Wildfire](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3DYEK-HTrGr9k%2520&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wildfire_blast&n=1)," "[Tyler](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3D__-9es2TdGc%26feature%3Dyoutu.be%2520&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wildfire_blast&n=2)," and "[Gina.](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3Dv1c2v-rp2j0%26feature%3Dyoutu.be&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wildfire_blast&n=3)" The ads begin airing statewide tomorrow.

"[Wildfire](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3DYEK-HTrGr9k%2520&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wildfire_blast&n=4)" focuses on Rob’s fight to combat Ohio’s prescription drug and heroin crisis, which tragically takes the lives of more than 25 Ohioans every week. "[Tyler](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3D__-9es2TdGc%26feature%3Dyoutu.be%2520&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wildfire_blast&n=5)" features Wayne Campbell from Pickerington, Ohio whose son Tyler died from a heroin overdose. Wayne tells his story and highlights how Ohio is fortunate to have Rob leading the fight on drug prevention and treatment efforts. The final ad, "[Gina](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3Dv1c2v-rp2j0%26feature%3Dyoutu.be&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wildfire_blast&n=6)," features Gina Bonaminio from Lakewood, Ohio. Gina is a recovering heroin addict whose struggle with addiction began at age 11. In the ad, Gina highlights Rob's leadership and describes how Rob brought Democrats and Republicans together to pass legislation, which gives hope to people like Gina and is truly making a difference.

You may click the videos below to watch “[Wildfire](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3DYEK-HTrGr9k%2520&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wildfire_blast&n=7)," "[Tyler](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3D__-9es2TdGc%26feature%3Dyoutu.be%2520&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wildfire_blast&n=8)," and "[Gina](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3Dv1c2v-rp2j0%26feature%3Dyoutu.be&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wildfire_blast&n=9)." [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3DYEK-HTrGr9k%2520&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wildfire_blast&n=10)[

Wildfire")Since Rob was elected to the Senate, he's focused on getting results for Ohio families, passing more than 45 bills into law. In this election, Ohio voters have a choice between moving forward with Rob's record of accomplishments and pro-growth policies for better wages and more jobs, or returning to Ted Strickland's failed policies of higher taxes, more regulations, and bigger government.

body:
| | While Governor Herbert yuks it up with lobbyists from the fossil fuel industry over golf outings and shooting tournaments, I'm working hard meeting voters like you across Utah and listening to your concerns.
---
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/7397560408716020480/-8322143044241257728?am=&recipientId=ENzs9AKZ1wqBssNbEIT6L&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) The current Governor is scratching the backs of lobbyists from the fossil fuel industry over golf outings and shooting tournaments. Meanwhile, I'm hard at work meeting voters like you across Utah. The Governor recently held an Energy Development Summit, which brought together bigwigs from fracking, oil, and gas companies. They are pushing Herbert to allow Utah's pristine land to be exploited by drilling. **Utah deserves better from our Governor -- and you have a choice.** This is the year of grassroots fundraising, and I'm leading one of the largest efforts in the state. I am having real conversations with voters, and gathering small dollar donations, $25 at a time. **[DONATE NOW.](https://act.myngp.com/el/7397560408716020480/-8322143044241257728?am=&recipientId=ENzs9AKZ1wqBssNbEIT6L&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)** The problem with our current system is that too many lobbyists have written 5- or 6-figure checks to keep Governor Herbert and his cronies in power. With rich contributors calling the shots, corporate lobbyists know Utah will never change course to put power back in the hands of the people. Money buys influence, and they have both. With their friends and golf buddies calling the shots at the State Capitol, the corporate lobbyists know Utah will never change course and put the voice of the people back in charge. Money buys influence and they have both. **That 's why I'm running: to take the power back from big business and put it in your hands again.** **[It's the end of the month, but you still have the opportunity to make a BIG statement by investing in our grassroots campaign today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/7397560408716020480/-8322143044241257728?am=&recipientId=ENzs9AKZ1wqBssNbEIT6L&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)** [Can we count on your $25 contribution before midnight?](https://act.myngp.com/el/7397560408716020480/-8322143044241257728?am=25&recipientId=ENzs9AKZ1wqBssNbEIT6L&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) If we continue to allow big businesses to call the shots, we're putting our children's future at risk. Thanks for joining me,
Mike [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.myngp.com/el/7397560408716020480/-8322143044241257728?am=&recipientId=ENzs9AKZ1wqBssNbEIT6L&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com "Mike Weinholtz Contribute") | Paid for by Mike Weinholtz for Governor

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: If you're with me, I need you to show it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
We just have to win. | Friend --

Every single day I spend on the campaign trail, I hear a new story from a person who needs someone in their corner. On one day, it will be a nurse working overtime while fighting breast cancer and facing foreclosure. On another, it will be a young man who struggles to afford the treatment he needs to stay mentally healthy.

This campaign is a constant reminder about how much there is worth fighting for in this country.

Donald Trump would make it harder to get health care and easier to get a gun. He would build a wall and tear down anyone who disagrees with him. If he has a vision for this country, it's one where animosities are lifted up as virtues and our common ties are dismissed as so much politically-correct nonsense.

So we've got to win. We have to secure this nomination once and for all and turn all our collective passion and energy toward beating Donald Trump -- and the first test is tonight at midnight, when we face a critical fundraising deadline.

**If you're with me, I hope you'll be one of the 10 donors in your area that we need to chip in before midnight so we can come out of this month stronger than ever. We’ll even send you a free sticker to say thank you:**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU2MjI5NzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0Njk4ODA5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Hillary

clean_body: We just have to win. | Friend -- Every single day I spend on the campaign trail, I hear a new story from a person who needs someone in their corner. On one day, it will be a nurse working overtime while fighting breast cancer and facing foreclosure. On another, it will be a young man who struggles to afford the treatment he needs to stay mentally healthy. This campaign is a constant reminder about how much there is worth fighting for in this country. Donald Trump would make it harder to get health care and easier to get a gun. He would build a wall and tear down anyone who disagrees with him. If he has a vision for this country, it's one where animosities are lifted up as virtues and our common ties are dismissed as so much politically-correct nonsense. So we've got to win. We have to secure this nomination once and for all and turn all our collective passion and energy toward beating Donald Trump -- and the first test is tonight at midnight, when we face a critical fundraising deadline. If you're with me, I hope you'll be one of the 10 donors in your area that we need to chip in before midnight so we can come out of this month stronger than ever. We’ll even send you a free sticker to say thank you: Thanks, Hillary | Hillary needs you now more than ever. clean_body: Today and tomorrow are two big milestones | "" Friend, Tomorrow is a big day for our campaign: That's when I'll be dropping off my nomination papers at the Government Accountability Board's office in Madison, with the maximum number of signatures possible. Thanks to the efforts of thousands of Wisconsinites, I'll be on the ballot in November. This is an exciting moment for our campaign, and I know I wouldn't be here without you. But, before we reach that milestone, can you help us reach today's?
